User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the platform, including participants and creators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication.

username.description: A unique username chosen by the user.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture, stored on Supabase.

isCreator.description: Indicates if the user has a 'Creator' role, allowing them to lead campaigns and manage chatrooms.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has administrative privileges for platform management.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user's profile.

followedUserIds.description: References to Users this user is following.

Campaign.title: Campaign
Campaign.description: Details about a community campaign or tour expedition.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Campaign entity.

description.description: A brief overview of the campaign's purpose and goals.

storyline.description: The detailed narrative or story behind the campaign.

budgetGoal.description: The target fundraising or pricing goal.

currentRaised.description: The current rating or funds progress.

startDate.description: The date and time when the campaign officially started.

endDate.description: The date and time when the campaign is scheduled to end.

creatorId.description: Reference to the User who created this campaign.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the campaign was created.

mediaUrls.description: URLs to images or videos related to the campaign, stored on Supabase.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a blog-style article or community post.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

content.description: The full content of the post.

authorId.description: Reference to the User who authored this post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

mediaUrl.description: URL to the featured image, stored on Supabase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Chatroom entity.

creatorId.description: Reference to the User who created this chatroom.

definition.description: User profiles. Blobs stored on Supabase.

params.name: userId
params.description: Unique ID matching Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Public expeditions. Media URLs point to Supabase.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique ID of the public campaign.

definition.description: Approved journal entries. Media stored on Supabase.

params.name: postId
params.description: Unique ID of the approved post.
